content.title: Navigation Challenge
content.body:
**Vocabulary note:** This section introduces directional position words (前面 - front/ahead, 左边 - left side, 右边 - right side, 后面 - behind/back) as new vocabulary. These location words expand beyond the basic 往左 and 往右 taught in the atomic phase.

**Map description (你在这里 = You are here):**

From your c

content.title: 学校 (xuéxiào) - School
content.body:
**学校** (xuéxiào) means "school."

- **学** (xué) = study/learn
- **校** (xiào) = school

**Example:**
- 我去学校。(Wǒ qù xuéxiào.) - I go to school.

content.title: Giving and Understanding Directions
content.body:
Basic direction pattern in Chinese:

**Asking:** 去 + [Place] + 怎么走？ = How do I get to [place]?

**Answering with directions:**
- 往左走 (wǎng zuǒ zǒu) - Go left
- 往右走 (wǎng yòu zǒu) - Go right

**Combined example:**
- Q: 去医院怎么走？(Qù yīyuàn zěnme zǒu?) - How do I get to the hospital?
- A: 往左走。(Wǎng zuǒ z

content.title: Asking "How to go?" - 去...怎么走？(qù...zěnme zǒu?)
content.body:
**去...怎么走？** (qù...zěnme zǒu?) means "How do I get to...?"

- **去** (qù) = to go
- **怎么** (zěnme) = how
- **走** (zǒu) = to walk/to go

**Pattern:** 去 + [Place] + 怎么走？

**Example:**
- 去医院怎么走？(Qù yīyuàn zěnme zǒu?) - How do I get to the hospital?

content.title: Planning a Trip
content.body:
**Scenario:**

小明 lives in Shanghai and wants to visit 北京 for the first time. He needs to:
1. Decide how to get there
2. Find places to visit
3. Know how to ask for directions

**Dialogue:**
- 小明：我想去北京。我坐什么？(Xiǎomíng: Wǒ xiǎng qù Běijīng. Wǒ zuò shénme?)
  *Xiaoming: I want to go to Beijing. What sh

content.title: 北京 (Běijīng) - Beijing
content.body:
**北京** (Běijīng) is the capital city of China.

- **北** (běi) = north
- **京** (jīng) = capital

**Example:**
- 我在北京。(Wǒ zài Běijīng.) - I am in Beijing.

content.title: 公共汽车 (gōnggòng qìchē) - Bus
content.body:
**公共汽车** (gōnggòng qìchē) means "bus" (public bus).

- **公共** (gōnggòng) = public
- **汽车** (qìchē) = automobile/car

**Example:**
- 公共汽车在哪里？(Gōnggòng qìchē zài nǎlǐ?) - Where is the bus?

content.title: Geography: China and Beijing
content.body:
**中国 (Zhōngguó)** - China
- Literally "Middle Kingdom" (中 = middle, 国 = country)
- The name reflects historical Chinese worldview

**北京 (Běijīng)** - Beijing
- China's capital city
- Literally "Northern Capital" (北 = north, 京 = capital)

**Usage pattern:**
- 我在中国。(Wǒ zài Zhōngguó.) - I am in China.

content.title: Expressing Location with 在 (zài)
content.body:
**在 (zài)** indicates location and means "to be at/in."

**Patterns:**
1. **[Subject] + 在 + [Place]** = [Subject] is at/in [Place]
   - 我在学校。(Wǒ zài xuéxiào.) - I am at school.

2. **[Place] + 在哪里？** = Where is [Place]?
   - 医院在哪里？(Yīyuàn zài nǎlǐ?) - Where is the hospital?

**Note:** 在 is used for

content.title: 火车 (huǒchē) - Train
content.body:
**火车** (huǒchē) means "train."

- **火** (huǒ) = fire
- **车** (chē) = vehicle

**Example:**
- 火车很大。(Huǒchē hěn dà.) - The train is very big.

content.title: 饭馆 (fànguǎn) - Restaurant
content.body:
**饭馆** (fànguǎn) means "restaurant."

- **饭** (fàn) = rice/meal
- **馆** (guǎn) = building/establishment

**Example:**
- 饭馆很好。(Fànguǎn hěn hǎo.) - The restaurant is very good.

content.title: Asking "Where?" - 在哪里？(zài nǎlǐ?)
content.body:
**在哪里？** (zài nǎlǐ?) means "Where is/are...?"

- **在** (zài) = to be at/in
- **哪里** (nǎlǐ) = where/which place

**Pattern:** [Subject] + 在哪里？

**Examples:**
- 医院在哪里？(Yīyuàn zài nǎlǐ?) - Where is the hospital?
- 你在哪里？(Nǐ zài nǎlǐ?) - Where are you?

content.title: 超市 (chāoshì) - Supermarket
content.body:
**超市** (chāoshì) means "supermarket."

- **超** (chāo) = super/exceed
- **市** (shì) = market

**Example:**
- 我在超市。(Wǒ zài chāoshì.) - I am at the supermarket.

content.title: Direction: 往右 (wǎng yòu) - Turn right
content.body:
**往右** (wǎng yòu) means "turn right" or "to the right."

- **往** (wǎng) = toward/to
- **右** (yòu) = right

**Example:**
- 往右走。(Wǎng yòu zǒu.) - Go right./Turn right.

content.title: 商店 (shāngdiàn) - Shop/Store
content.body:
**商店** (shāngdiàn) means "shop" or "store."

- **商** (shāng) = commerce/business
- **店** (diàn) = shop/store

**Example:**
- 商店在哪里？(Shāngdiàn zài nǎlǐ?) - Where is the shop?

content.title: Direction: 往左 (wǎng zuǒ) - Turn left
content.body:
**往左** (wǎng zuǒ) means "turn left" or "to the left."

- **往** (wǎng) = toward/to
- **左** (zuǒ) = left

**Example:**
- 往左走。(Wǎng zuǒ zǒu.) - Go left./Turn left.

content.title: Daily Routine Locations
content.body:
**Vocabulary note:** This section introduces new time and location words: 早上 (morning), 中午 (noon), 下午 (afternoon), 晚上 (evening), 右边 (right side), 回家 (go home). These are new vocabulary introduced here as part of integration practice and are assumed prior knowledge from earlier subtopics.

**李老师's ty

content.title: Common Places in Daily Life
content.body:
Key places you might visit or reference in daily conversation:

**Education:** 学校 (xuéxiào) - school

**Health:** 医院 (yīyuàn) - hospital

**Shopping:**
- 商店 (shāngdiàn) - shop/store (general, smaller)
- 超市 (chāoshì) - supermarket (larger, self-service)

**Dining:** 饭馆 (fànguǎn) - restaurant

**Patte

content.title: 中国 (Zhōngguó) - China
content.body:
**中国** (Zhōngguó) means "China."

- **中** (zhōng) = middle/center
- **国** (guó) = country

The literal meaning is "Middle Kingdom" or "Central Country."

**Example:**
- 我在中国。(Wǒ zài Zhōngguó.) - I am in China.

content.title: Transportation Decision-Making
content.body:
Different situations require different transportation choices. Consider these scenarios:

**Scenario A:** 你在上海。你去北京。
*You are in Shanghai. You go to Beijing.*
- Distance: ~1,300 km
- Options: 飞机 (2 hours), 火车 (4-6 hours)

**Scenario B:** 你在家。你去医院。医院很近。
*You are at home. You go to the hospital. The h

content.title: 飞机 (fēijī) - Airplane
content.body:
**飞机** (fēijī) means "airplane" or "plane."

- **飞** (fēi) = fly
- **机** (jī) = machine

**Example:**
- 我坐飞机去北京。(Wǒ zuò fēijī qù Běijīng.) - I take a plane to Beijing.

The verb **坐** (zuò) means "to sit" but is used for taking transportation.

content.title: 出租车 (chūzūchē) - Taxi
content.body:
**出租车** (chūzūchē) means "taxi."

- **出租** (chūzū) = to rent out
- **车** (chē) = vehicle

**Example:**
- 我打出租车。(Wǒ dǎ chūzūchē.) - I take a taxi.

Note: **打** (dǎ) literally means "to hit" but is used idiomatically for "to take/call a taxi."

content.title: Transportation Methods Comparison
content.body:
Different transportation methods are used for different purposes in Chinese:

| Vehicle | Chinese | When to use |
|---------|---------|-------------|
| Plane | 飞机 (fēijī) | Long distances, going abroad |
| Train | 火车 (huǒchē) | Medium-long distances, between cities |
| Bus | 公共汽车 (gōnggòng qìchē) |

content.title: 医院 (yīyuàn) - Hospital
content.body:
**医院** (yīyuàn) means "hospital."

- **医** (yī) = medicine/doctor
- **院** (yuàn) = institution/courtyard

**Example:**
- 医院很大。(Yīyuàn hěn dà.) - The hospital is very big.
